question: Show me all rows from the customers table
Get all orders with customer names by joining main.customers and reports.orders
sql: SELECT c.name, c.email, o.order_date, o.total FROM main.customers c JOIN reports.orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id ORDER BY o.order_date DESC LIMIT 50

question: How many orders were placed per customer?
sql: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 100

question: Find all orders from the last 30 days
sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) ORDER BY order_date DESC LIMIT 100

question: Show the most recent 10 transactions
sql: SELECT * FROM transactions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

question: Get total revenue per product category
sql: SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders GROUP BY category ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 50

question: List customers who have never placed an order
sql: SELECT c.id, c.name FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE o.id IS NULL LIMIT 100
